name: Battle for Dream Island RP
description: Welcome to the BFDI RP, where you can become any object you imagine in the wacky world of Goiky! Join beloved characters like Leafy, Firey, and Bubble in this open-world adventure. Create your own anthropomorphic object and dive into zany challenges, explore diverse landscapes, or simply enjoy the quirky everyday life of animated items. From competing for Dream Island to starting your own silly quests, the possibilities are endless. Choose your object persona and embark on a journey filled with friendship, rivalry, and absurd fun in this delightfully offbeat universe where the ordinary becomes extraordinary
creator: yoogav
